DataRequest.Name: Path traversal attempt / SCW
DataRequest.Description: This rule goes after the attempts by a malicious threat actor if they attempt to use path traversal payloads to exploit a web application
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: An attempt at path traversal exploits on $destIpAddr from $srcIpAddr was found

SubPattern.name: Path_1
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND (uriStem REGEXP "(\.\.[\\])|(\.\.%2[fF])|(\.\.%5[cC])|(%2[eE]%2[eE]%2[fF])|(%2[eE]%2[eE]%5[cC])" OR uriQuery REGEXP "(\.\.[\\])|(\.\.%2[fF])|(\.\.%5[cC])|(%2[eE]%2[eE]%2[fF])|(%2[eE]%2[eE]%5[cC])" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "(\.\.[\\])|(\.\.%2[fF])|(\.\.%5[cC])|(%2[eE]%2[eE]%2[fF])|(%2[eE]%2[eE]%5[cC])")

SubPattern.name: Path_4
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND (uriStem REGEXP "(%[cC]0%[aA][fF]|%[cC]1%9[cC]|%[eE][fF]%[bB][cC]%8[fF]|%[eE]0%80%[aA][fF])" OR uriQuery REGEXP "(%[cC]0%[aA][fF]|%[cC]1%9[cC]|%[eE][fF]%[bB][cC]%8[fF]|%[eE]0%80%[aA][fF])" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "(%[cC]0%[aA][fF]|%[cC]1%9[cC]|%[eE][fF]%[bB][cC]%8[fF]|%[eE]0%80%[aA][fF])")

SubPattern.name: Path_5
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND (uriQuery REGEXP "%00" OR uriStem REGEXP "%00" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "%00")

SubPattern.name: Path_6
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND (uriQuery REGEXP "(/etc/passwd|/etc/shadow|/proc/self/environ|/var/www/html/index\.php)" OR uriStem REGEXP "(/etc/passwd|/etc/shadow|/proc/self/environ|/var/www/html/index\.php)" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "(/etc/passwd|/etc/shadow|/proc/self/environ|/var/www/html/index\.php)")

SubPattern.name: Path_7
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND (uriQuery REGEXP "(C:[/\\][Ww]indows[/\\]win\.ini|C:[/\\][Ww]indows[/\\][Ss]ystem32[/\\]drivers[/\\]etc[/\\]hosts|\\\\\.\\pipe\\)" AND uriStem REGEXP "(C:[/\\][Ww]indows[/\\]win\.ini|C:[/\\][Ww]indows[/\\][Ss]ystem32[/\\]drivers[/\\]etc[/\\]hosts|\\\\\.\\pipe\\)" AND httpReferrer REGEXP "(C:[/\\][Ww]indows[/\\]win\.ini|C:[/\\][Ww]indows[/\\][Ss]ystem32[/\\]drivers[/\\]etc[/\\]hosts|\\\\\.\\pipe\\)")

SubPattern.name: Path_8
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType=Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic AND (uriStem REGEXP "(\.{2,}[/\\]{2,}\.{2,}[/\\]{2,}etc/passwd)|((\./){3,}etc/passwd)|(\.{2,}\\.{2,}\\[Ww]indows\\win\.ini)" OR uriQuery REGEXP "(\.{2,}[/\\]{2,}\.{2,}[/\\]{2,}etc/passwd)|((\./){3,}etc/passwd)|(\.{2,}\\.{2,}\\[Ww]indows\\win\.ini)" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "(\.{2,}[/\\]{2,}\.{2,}[/\\]{2,}etc/passwd)|((\./){3,}etc/passwd)|(\.{2,}\\.{2,}\\[Ww]indows\\win\.ini)")

SubPattern.name: Path_9
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND uriStem REGEXP "((\.\.|%2[eE]%2[eE])(%2[fF]|%5[cC]|[/\\]|%[cC]0%[aA][fF]|%[cC]1%9[cC])){2,}(etc/passwd|[Ww]indows\\win\.ini)" OR uriQuery REGEXP "((\.\.|%2[eE]%2[eE])(%2[fF]|%5[cC]|[/\\]|%[cC]0%[aA][fF]|%[cC]1%9[cC])){2,}(etc/passwd|[Ww]indows\\win\.ini)" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "((\.\.|%2[eE]%2[eE])(%2[fF]|%5[cC]|[/\\]|%[cC]0%[aA][fF]|%[cC]1%9[cC])){2,}(etc/passwd|[Ww]indows\\win\.ini)"

SubPattern.name: Path_10
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND uriStem REGEXP "(\.\./(index\.php|config\.php|appsettings\.json)|WEB-INF/web\.xml)" AND uriQuery REGEXP "(\.\./(index\.php|config\.php|appsettings\.json)|WEB-INF/web\.xml)" AND httpReferrer REGEXP "(\.\./(index\.php|config\.php|appsettings\.json)|WEB-INF/web\.xml)"

IncidentDef.ArgList: srcIpAddr = Path_1.srcIpAddr,destIpAddr = Path_1.destIpAddr,srcIpAddr = Path_2.srcIpAddr,destIpAddr = Path_2.destIpAddr,srcIpAddr = Path_3.srcIpAddr,destIpAddr = Path_3.destIpAddr
